title: Federal minimum wage: nominal vs. real 1968 value in 2024 dollars ($/hr)

source.name: Bureau of Labor Statistics / Department of Labor

notes: Illustrative; comparison between the current nominal federal minimum wage ($7.25, unchanged since 2009) and what the 1968 peak minimum wage ($1.60) is worth in 2024 dollars after CPI adjustment (~$14.63). Shows purchasing power erosion.
